title: Lesson 42: (Vocab) - シャツ, マッチ, コピー...

intro_cards.title: Katakana Combinations
intro_cards.body:
Combination sounds work the same in katakana — small ャ, ュ, ョ combine with other characters:

シャ (sha), シュ (shu), ショ (sho)
チャ (cha), チュ (chu), チョ (cho)

This lesson includes シャツ (shatsu, shirt), which uses the シャ combination.
